summary: Iteration 125: Case-Insensitive Honorary License Bug Fix VERIFIED - ALL CRITICAL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 tests passed verifying the fix for case-sensitive license_type checks. Frontend: Rizza dashboard shows correct Account Value ($6,530.60), Total Profit ($1,530.60), Performance (30.6%), and Growth Projections (1yr: $106K, 2yr: $1.55M, 3yr: $22.7M, 5yr: $4.85B). Rewards card correctly hidden for licensees. Store link contains '/store' path.

issues: Console warnings about DialogContent requiring DialogTitle for accessibility - not critical but should be addressed for a11y compliance

critical_code_review_comments: The _is_honorary() helper function at calculations.py line 13-18 properly handles case variations
All license_type checks in calculations.py and server.py now use _is_honorary()
MongoDB regex queries use $options: 'i' for case-insensitive matching
Fallback projections added to year-projections endpoint

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 bug fix features verified working

bug_1_profit_summary_zero_values.issue: Honorary licensee dashboard showed '$0.00 Total Profit', '0.0% Performance'
bug_1_profit_summary_zero_values.fix: _is_honorary() helper for case-insensitive checks at calculations.py line 13-18
evidence: Frontend dashboard displays: Account Value=$6,530.60, Total Profit=$1,530.60, Performance=30.6%

bug_2_failed_projections.issue: 'Failed to load projections' on licensee dashboard
bug_2_failed_projections.root_cause: Projection calculation failed silently when license_type case didn't match
bug_2_failed_projections.fix: Case-insensitive regex queries with $options: 'i' + fallback projections
evidence: GET /api/profit/licensee/year-projections returns 4 projections with correct values
No 'Failed to load projections' error found

bug_3_health_check_broken_licensees.issue: Admin health check showed some licensees as 'broken'

bug_4_rewards_card_visibility.issue: Rewards card should be hidden for licensees (not part of rewards program)
evidence: Rizza (licensee) dashboard does NOT show Rewards card
Admin dashboard DOES show Rewards card

bug_5_store_link_path.issue: 'Open Rewards & Store' button linked to homepage not store panel
bug_5_store_link_path.fix: Store link updated to /store path in DashboardPage.jsx

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes from the case-insensitive license_type issue are verified working. The _is_honorary() helper function handles all case variations correctly. All 6 honorary licensees return valid projections. Rewards card is correctly hidden for licensees but visible for non-licensees. Store link contains /store path. Admin simulation flow works: Simulate View dropdown > Honorary Licensee View > Select specific member > Start Simulation.
